title: Les Fleurs
description: A Vanilla "plus plus plus plus" modpack made with immersion in mind towards providing a slow and diverse experience more in line with earlier versions of minecraft without rejecting it's modern features and comforts.
body:
Les Fleurs is inspired by likes of Fernsfield Farming (along with the original youtube video by Snifferfish), Homestead on plethora of various modpacks. Originally made as a private pack for a small group of friends it grew into a personal project aiming to create a personalised modpack that has my very own "that something".

Distant Horizons along with multiple worldgen biomes allows for in many ways more varied terrain and larger scale builds that can make use of increased render distance.

Smaller scare builds can benefit from many detailing mods such as Clutter, Cluttered, Supplementaries, Amendments and the Let's Do series with the latter providing much of the content to experience and themes to build around.

Hephasteus provides an alternative progression path in tools and Create - in resource collection allowing for a more immersive type of farm than a typical grinder.

All this is immersed in multiple mods providing addditional visual effects and variety for increased immersion and a more lively, moving world.

Now including configuration from [https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)
